title: Settings
subtitle: Customize your experience and manage your business.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.description: Basic information of your personal account.
profile.name: Name
profile.delete_account_desc: This action is irreversible and will permanently delete all your data.

business.title: Business Identity
business.description: Customize how your clients see you on quotes and contracts.
business.show_name_pdf_desc: Include your business name in quotes and contracts
business.brand_color_help: This color will be automatically applied to your PDF quotes and contracts.

contracts.title: Default Values
contracts.description: Set the default values that will appear in your new events.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Control which emails and push notifications you receive.

email_payment_receipt.label: Payment Receipts
email_payment_receipt.desc: Receive an email when a payment is registered

email_event_reminder.label: Event Reminder
email_event_reminder.desc: Receive an email 24h before your event

email_subscription_updates.label: Subscription Updates
email_subscription_updates.desc: Emails about changes in your plan

push_enabled.label: Push Notifications
push_enabled.desc: Enable or disable all push notifications

push_payment_received.label: Payment Received
push_payment_received.desc: Push notification when a payment is registered

subscription.title: Subscription and Billing
subscription.description: Manage your current plan and payment methods.

stripe.cancel: You can manage or cancel your subscription from the web payment portal.

apple.cancel: Your subscription was made via iOS. To cancel it, open Settings > your Apple ID > Subscriptions on your iPhone or iPad.

google.cancel: Your subscription was made via Android. To cancel it, open Google Play Store > Payments & subscriptions.

subscription.cancel_at_period_end: Your subscription will cancel at the end of the period.
subscription.upgrade_pro: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited limits

validation.new_password_min: The new password must be at least 8 characters long
